title: Witches of the Fourth Multiplayer
description:
EARLY ACCESS 
Package is named the Hollows Chapter 1 Because that was
the Name I Originally wanted for the Game But i Changed It 
So Yeah............... Witches of the Fourth 

Witches of the Fourth is a Team Base Battle Between Black Magic Vs Earths Core Magic

August the 7th 2022

This 2.0 Update is a COMPLETE Redesign of the Game

The Redesign Includes

New Maps

New and Improved FPS Gameplay

Updated Game Modes

Strange Weapons

FEATURES

1 Spell Factions Your Faction Will Determine The Spells and Abilities You Use In Battle.
The Factions Are ( Astrology, Necromancy, Divinity ETC ) 

2 New Game Modes Includes Team Deathmatch And Free-for-all More Will be Added as Time Goes On

3 UPDATED AND IMPROVED Multiplayer and Matchmaking Systems

4 Strange But Powerful Weapons And Spells

5 New Environments

 DevNote

Hi So Yeah Overall i COMPLETELY Redesign the Game Made it better tbh 
I Glad with the First Build Got a Lot of Good Impressions I'm Glad
Everyone liked it but the Thing i Got from the Feedback is that This
Game Can Be More So I Improved Everything I Hope You
Guys Like The 2.0 Update More is to Come Here is What the Following Updates
Will Be 

And Maybe a Flying Witch Broom That Shoots Lasers Cuz Why Not ?
description_short: Witches of the Fourth 2.0 Is An Online Multiplayer Spell Casting TeamBase FPS Witch Hunt Where You Duel Against Your Friends Using Powerful Spells and Magical Abilities to Collect There Souls The Player With the Most Souls Win Witches of the Fourth is the Battle Between Black Magic and Core Magic
